subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! In this Most Great Dispensation, manifest thy valor and courage through the revelation of the signs of God's love and the radiance of His lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در این ظهور اعظم مردی و دلیری بظهور آثار محبت الله و اشراق انوار
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
